palemoon.diff

www/palemoon: Update to 27.8.1

PR:		???????
Approved by:	lichray@gmail.com (maintainer)

----

Build tested on 11.0/amd64 and 12.0/amd64

Building with SNDIO=on requires the bsd.gecko.mk patch in bug #226476
due to the removal of WebRTC code in Pale Moon.
